name: Hazelnut Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast hazelnuts in the oven at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes until fragrant. Rub nuts together in a dish towel to remove some skin. Coarsely chop and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat butter with an electric mixer on medium speed until soft and creamy. Add sugar and lemon zest, beating until light and fluffy (about 2 minutes).
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, then add vanilla. Mix in hazelnuts until evenly distributed.
4. Gradually mix flour, baking powder, and salt into the butter mixture. Form dough into two 10-by-2 inch rectangular logs. Place on an ungreased baking sheet, at least 2 inches apart.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until set and golden brown. Let cool on the baking sheet for 15 minutes.
6. Cut cooled logs into 1/2-inch diagonal slices using a serrated knife. Discard end pieces.
7. Arrange sliced biscotti cut sides down, close together on two baking sheets. Bake on top and middle racks for 8 to 9 minutes until lightly browned. Flip and continue baking on opposite racks for another 9 minutes.
8. Cool completely on the baking sheets before serving.
